evals.prompt: Add Chinese and Japanese language support to my Object UI app. I need a language switcher in the header and all form labels should change when the user switches language.
evals.expected_output: Provides I18nProvider setup with lazy loading, useObjectTranslation for the language switcher, and pattern for localizing schema labels via t() before passing to SchemaRenderer.

evals.prompt: How do I format dates and currencies differently based on the user's locale in Object UI?
evals.expected_output: Provides useObjectTranslation hook with formatCurrency, formatDate, formatNumber usage examples.

evals.prompt: My Object UI app needs to support Arabic with proper right-to-left layout. How do I set this up?
evals.expected_output: Provides I18nProvider setup with Arabic locale, direction from useObjectTranslation, RTL-aware Tailwind utilities (rtl: prefix).
